scope: custom: core_engine + combat — Module 8 (integration + archetype sweep)
note: Integration engine wiring M1-M7 + symmetric archetype sweep + Wilson 95% CI verdict. M-method constants (Wilson z=1.96, acceptance band 0.40-0.60, N=2000, exchange cap 30) cited to i17_simulation_prep. Class B: modal Committed depth (§4.6). All MECHANICAL numbers come from M1-M7 ledgers (no new mechanical constants). VERDICT: v32 build axis NOT BALANCED in the frontal-symmetric baseline (77/90 significant imbalances, 4/10 non-viable). Discriminator is weapon category (heavy_weapon dominates light_blade) more than raw End/Str. Engine invariants PASS (self-matchups ~50%, Wilson CI, felled contest). Run honestly — no constant tuned to force a pass. FLAGS: [ASSUMPTION] symmetric doctrine not Nash solve (mean-zero, cyclic matrix); [ASSUMPTION] frontal facing baseline (M7 flank/rear not exercised); [GAP] §4.5 Reading->sigma not modeled (carried from M7). Verdict sound for the frontal baseline stated; NOT yet a verdict on the full positional game — re-run with Reading wired + positional variant before concluding the axis itself is mis-weighted.

entries.quoted_text: Wilson score interval z for 95% confidence (standard normal two-sided 0.975 quantile)
acceptance band lower edge — archetype matchups land 40-60% (i17_simulation_prep acceptance; skill §8.8 band)
acceptance band upper edge — archetype matchups land 40-60% (i17_simulation_prep acceptance; skill §8.8 band)
Monte Carlo fights per ordered matchup (N>=1000 required by prep doc; 2000 for tighter Wilson CI)
per-fight exchange cap (decisive-by-attrition fallback if neither felled; prevents non-terminating loops)
modal attack depth = Committed (depth 3, canonical Standard attack) — symmetric doctrine for the integration baseline
